description: Fragment of a letter from Natan b. Nahray. Regarding trades, especially of silk, and complains about the situation in Mahdiyya, that he has heard about from letters from his aunt and nephew. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #441) VMR
description_he: שרידי מכתב מנתן בן נהראי, על עסקי משי ותלונות על מצב אל-מהדייה
